description: Create a 2-back working memory experiment in PsychoPy Builder. In a 2-back task, participants see a sequence of letters and must respond whenever the current letter matches the letter presented two trials ago. The experiment requires a conditions file at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/conditions/nback_conditions.csv with columns 'letter', 'trial_type', and 'correct_response' for at least 60 trials using uppercase consonants. The logic must maintain a 20-40% target rate (where 'trial_type' is 'target' and 'correct_response' is 'space'), ensuring the first two trials are non-targets. The experiment file at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/nback_task.psyexp must include 'Instructions', 'Trial' (displaying '$letter' with a 'space' keyboard response), and 'End' routines. The 'Trial' routine must be governed by a sequential loop using the conditions file with nReps set to 1.
